confirmations.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
confirmations.removeRelationship: Are you sure you want to remove this relationship?

empty.getStartedPrompt: Get started by creating your first item

companion.title: Companion Mode
companion.subtitle: Gentle guidance while you work
companion.pausedBySteward: Companion guidance has been paused by your steward.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Transitus account
login.contactSteward: Ask your organization's steward for an invite link.
login.removedAlert: Your access to the organization has been removed. Please contact a steward if you believe this is an error.
login.checkoutSuccess: Payment successful! Sign in to access your Transitus account.

signup.title: Invitation Required
signup.subtitle: {{appName}} is an invite-only platform built for human-centered organizations.
signup.step1: Ask your organization's steward for an invitation link
signup.step2: Click the link to create your account
signup.step3: Verify your email and sign in
signup.notOnPlatform: If your organization isn't on {{appName}} yet,
signup.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: Check your email for a password reset link. It may take a few minutes to arrive.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

join.title: You're invited
join.subtitle: Join {{tenantName}} on {{appName}} as a {{role}}
join.yourNamePlaceholder: How you'd like to be known
join.accountCreated: Account created! Please check your email to verify your address, then sign in.
join.inviteOnly: {{appName}} is an invite-only platform. To join, please contact your organization's steward for an invitation link.
join.alreadyRegisteredError: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead, and the invite will be applied automatically.
join.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
join.notFound: This invitation link is not valid.
join.alreadyUsed: This invitation has already been used.
join.expired: This invitation has expired. Please ask your steward for a new one.
join.error: Something went wrong validating this invitation.
join.alreadySignedIn: Already have an account? Sign in

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Create your account to get started

accountCreation.paymentConfirmedDesc: Create your account below. This will be the steward account for your organization.
accountCreation.startSetupDesc: Start with your steward account, then continue setup.
accountCreation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

welcome.title: Your Transitus workspace is almost ready
welcome.description: We'll walk you through a few quick steps to configure your workspace. This takes about two minutes.

stewardWelcome.title: You are the Steward of this workspace
stewardWelcome.description: As the founding member, you hold the keys to this workspace. You can invite your team, manage settings, and shape how your organization uses Transitus.
stewardWelcome.roleNote: You'll choose your personal role in the next step — this is separate from your workspace responsibilities.

archetype.title: Choose Your Mission Archetype
archetype.description: This shapes your default journey stages, language, and community signals.
archetype.privacyModeDesc: When enabled, reflections and narratives use anonymized language such as "a family" or "a person" instead of names.
archetype.privacyModeWhat: Anonymizes names in reflections and narratives.
archetype.privacyModeWhere: Testimonium, NRI summaries, and public presence pages.
archetype.privacyModeWhy: For healthcare-adjacent or confidential outreach environments.

relationalFocus.title: What is the primary focus of your work?
relationalFocus.description: This shapes how your workspace presents relationships. You can change it later in Settings.
relationalFocus.humanFocusedDesc: Your mission centers on people — individuals, families, or communities.
relationalFocus.institutionFocusedDesc: Your mission centers on organizations — partners, agencies, or churches.
relationalFocus.hybridDesc: Your mission engages both people and organizations with equal depth.

ministryRole.title: How do you serve your community?
ministryRole.description: This doesn't change your permissions. It simply helps Transitus speak your language.

multiCity.title: Do you operate in more than one city?
multiCity.description: Organizations that serve multiple communities can unlock Civitas™ — metro-level awareness, expansion planning, and narrative segmentation.
multiCity.oneCommunityDesc: We focus on a single city or region. You can always add more later.
multiCity.multipleCitiesDesc: We serve communities across multiple metros. Enable Civitas™ trial.

details.title: Organization Details
details.description: These will appear throughout your Transitus workspace.
details.slugTaken: This slug is already in use. Please choose a different one.
details.featuresUpgrade: Features are determined by your plan tier. You can upgrade anytime from settings.

knowledge.title: Teach NRI about your organization
knowledge.description: Upload a PDF — your annual report, mission statement, or team guide — and NRI will learn your language, programs, and people.
knowledge.uploadPdfDesc: Annual report, handbook, or mission doc
knowledge.nriLearnsDesc: Programs, language, and key facts are extracted
knowledge.smarterGuidanceDesc: Your AI assistant speaks with your voice
knowledge.uploadedNote: NRI is already learning from it. You can add more documents later from Settings.
knowledge.uploadDropzoneDesc: Max 5 MB · Annual reports, handbooks, or mission docs work great
knowledge.optionalNote: This step is optional — you can always add documents later from your workspace settings.

confirm.title: Confirm & Create
confirm.description: Review your setup before creating your Transitus workspace.

verifyEmail.title: One last thing — verify your email
verifyEmail.description: Your workspace is ready! We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please verify your email to access your Transitus workspace.
verifyEmail.checkInbox: Check your inbox and click the verification link, then come back to sign in.

toasts.paymentConfirmed: Payment confirmed! Let's set up your workspace.
toasts.uploadProcessing: Upload may still be processing. You can check later in Settings.

guide.title: Getting Started
guide.subtitle: Building your rhythm, one step at a time.
guide.allSetMessage: Your onboarding is complete. Your workspace is ready for building relationships.
guide.helpText: These steps help you get the most from Transitus.
guide.tooltipWhat: Guided onboarding steps tailored to your mission archetype.
guide.tooltipWhere: This page — accessible from your Command Center.
guide.tooltipWhy: Helps your team build rhythm without overwhelming the first day.
guide.stepSkipped: Step skipped — you can always come back.

quickAdd.title: Quick Add — Review Suggestions
quickAdd.subtitle: Review and approve pending items
quickAdd.noPendingDesc: Suggestions from chat, email analysis, and OCR will appear here for review.

feedback.title: My Help Requests
feedback.subtitle: Track your submissions and see updates
feedback.yourRequestsDesc: Something not working? Have an idea? Let us know.

sponsoredSetup.workspacePreparedFor: A workspace has been prepared for

welcome.cardDescription: A Gardener has prepared this space for you. Before you begin, we'd love to know a little about how you'll use Transitus — just a few quick steps.

role.cardDescription: This shapes your experience — what you see first, and how the system supports you.

migration.cardDescription: Your workspace includes Transitus Bridge™ — our integration and migration tools. Knowing your current system helps us prepare the best path forward.
migration.notesLabel: Anything we should know about your data?
migration.notesPlaceholder: e.g. We have ~2,000 contacts and 5 years of donation history in Bloomerang...
migration.notesHint: Optional — this helps your Gardener prepare migration tools.
migration.noCrmMessage: No problem — Transitus is designed to grow with you. You can always connect tools later through the Relatio™ marketplace.

profile.cardDescription: This is how your name will appear in reflections, activities, and team views.
profile.changeAnytime: You can change these anytime in Settings.

toasts.welcome: Welcome to Transitus. Your workspace is ready.

importCenter.title: Import Center
importCenter.subtitle: Transition from any CRM — upload CSV exports and map them into Transitus
importCenter.uploadPrompt: Upload a CSV file to get started

history.title: Import History
history.description: All import runs and CSV imports, merged chronologically

rollback.dialogDescription: This will undo the import by deleting created records and restoring updated records to their previous state. This action cannot be undone.

toasts.csvTooLarge: CSV has {{rows}} rows — max {{max}} for preview. Split the file first.

globalKeywordsAdmin.heading: Global Keywords
globalKeywordsAdmin.helpTooltip: These keywords serve as the default library for all metros. RIMs can override specific keywords per metro.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: User management and settings
admin.pendingApprovalsDesc: The following users are waiting for account approval:
admin.communityMembersDesc: Steward the roles and geographic access for each person in your community.

userDialog.descriptionNote: Thoughtfully shape how this person experiences the community.
userDialog.waitingDesc: This person is waiting for your invitation to begin
userDialog.currentRolesDesc: Each role shapes how this person experiences the platform — what they see, what they're invited to notice, and how they can serve.
userDialog.noRolesYet: No roles yet — consider what calling fits this person.
userDialog.regionalHomeDesc: Assigning a region gently focuses this person's view to the communities within that geography. If no region is chosen, they see the full landscape.
userDialog.noMetrosInRegion: No metros in this region yet
userDialog.adminLeadershipNote: Those with Admin or Leadership roles naturally see across all regions — no assignment needed.
userDialog.individualMetroAccessDesc: Sometimes a person's work touches specific communities beyond their region. You can gently extend their view to include individual metros here.
userDialog.fullLandscapeAdminNote: Admin and Leadership roles naturally see across all communities.
userDialog.fullLandscapeNoGeoNote: Without any geographic assignment, this person sees the full landscape — like an executive with organization-wide awareness.
userDialog.focusedAccessDesc: This person sees communities from their region{{plusMetros}}.
userDialog.execWideLandscapeNote: A person with no region and no individual metros assigned is treated as having organization-wide awareness — they see everything, like an executive. Assigning even one metro or region gently focuses their view to only those communities.

admin.label: Admin
admin.description: Full system access, manage users and settings

regional_lead.label: Regional Lead
regional_lead.description: Manage assigned region and its metros

enneagramAssessment.savedDesc: Your Enneagram results (Type {{type}}w{{wing}}) have been saved.
enneagramAssessment.errorDesc: Please try again or save your type manually in settings.

activities.discoveryCallDesc: Initial outreach call with a potential partner
activities.partnerMeetingDesc: Scheduled meeting with a partner organization
activities.deleteActivityConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this activity? This action cannot be undone.
